task: A3 - Fix Frontend Feedback API Path
deliverables_completed: frontend/lib/api.ts - Updated sendFeedback signature to include sessionId
frontend/hooks/useFeedback.ts - Updated submitFeedback to accept sessionId
context_summary: Fixed the feedback API path from wildcard '*' to actual sessionId. The API endpoint was using /sessions/*/messages/{messageId}/feedback which is invalid. Now it correctly uses /sessions/{sessionId}/messages/{messageId}/feedback.

changes_summary.api.ts: sendFeedback now takes (sessionId, messageId, rating, comment?) instead of (messageId, rating, comment?)
changes_summary.useFeedback.ts: submitFeedback now takes (sessionId, messageId, rating, comment?)
changes_summary.feedback-buttons.tsx: Added sessionId prop, passes it to onFeedback callback
changes_summary.message-bubble.tsx: Added sessionId prop, passes it to FeedbackButtons
changes_summary.chat-container.tsx: Added sessionId prop, passes it to MessageBubble
changes_summary.chat/page.tsx: Pass currentSessionId to ChatContainer, updated handleFeedback signature

acceptance_criteria_status.feedback_submission: ✅ Works end-to-end with correct session/message IDs
acceptance_criteria_status.no_wildcard: ✅ No wildcard * in any API path

notes: Feedback feature now properly includes sessionId in the API path. The feedback buttons only show when sessionId is available (i.e., not in temporary/new sessions).
